title: Kids’ Wheel Clay Workshop
description:
Kids’ Wheel & Clay Workshop

Perfect for kids aged 6+ to explore the pottery wheel and handbuilding

Let your child dive into the joy of clay with a fun, hands-on experience! They’ll craft their own unique pottery piece while learning basic wheel and clay techniques in our warm, welcoming studio.

Air-Dry Clay

  • No kiln needed – take your creation home the same day!

  • Ideal for simple, decorative pieces

  • Paint it later at home with an acrylic paint set

  • We’ll pack your piece carefully and send it with a free acrylic paint set

  • Great for those who want a quick and creative experience!

Terracotta Clay

  • Natural reddish clay, kiln-fired and glazed

  • Perfect for functional items like cups, plates, and bowls

  • Food-safe with a durable finish

  • We glaze and fire your piece-no need to return for painting

  • Ready for pick up in 1–2 weeks

Ceramic Clay

  • This clay is kiln-fired to make your piece strong and long-lasting.

  • Perfect for functional items like cups, plates, and bowls

  • Includes bisque firing and glaze firing for a glossy, food-safe finish

  • You’ll leave your piece with us – we’ll notify you when it’s ready for pickup (about 4–5 weeks)

  • Best for those who want a polished, professional result!

Give your child the joy of creativity and a special keepsake to remember their pottery adventure. Book your Kids Pottery Workshop today and let them craft a memorable piece that they’ll cherish forever!

location.address: Al Khayat Avenue, No 10, 19th street, Al Qouz 1, Dubai &amp;#x2F; UAE

seoMeta.title: Kids’ Wheel & Clay Workshop | Kidrove
seoMeta.description: Kids’ Wheel & Clay WorkshopPerfect for kids aged 6+ to explore the pottery wheel and handbuildingLet your child dive into the joy of clay with a fun, hands-o...

faqs.question: Can we take our piece home on the same day?
faqs.answer: Unfortunately, no. It typically takes 1-2 weeks for us to dry and bisque fire your pieces. After that, you’ll need to return for the glazing session. If time constraints prevent you from attending the glazing session, we can apply a transparent glaze to your pieces to make them shiny and food-safe. Once they’re ready, you can collect them from our studio.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for Essad, Fazza, or Emirates Platinum cards?
faqs.answer: Currently, we don’t have specific offers for Emirates Platinum Card, Essad, or Fazza members as we are a new studio. However, we’re in the process of working with banks to bring you some fantastic deals soon! Your support means a lot to us, and we can’t wait to share exciting offers with you in the near future.

faqs.question: Do you provide home delivery for the final artwork?
faqs.answer: We do not offer home delivery services for the final artwork. However, you are welcome to collect your pieces from our studio once they are ready.

faqs.question: Can I keep my artwork at your studio for a longer period if I'm out of town?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can accommodate that. We’ll keep your pieces here for a maximum of two months. After that, there will be an additional charge of AED 1 dirham for storage fees.

faqs.question: Would you accept toddlers while I'm attending the workshop?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can bring your toddler to the studio, provided that there is someone available to take care of them during the workshop.

title: Mug Workshop Sip in Style
description:
Kids’ Design Your Own Super Cool Mug Workshop: Sip in Style

Looking for a fun and creative way to keep your kids entertained? Our Kids’ Design Your Own Super Cool Mug Workshop is the perfect chance for them to craft a mug that’s uniquely theirs. Picture them enjoying their favorite drinks from a mug they designed and created themselves—how cool is that?

In our inviting and friendly studio, children will dive into their imaginations to make their own custom mugs.

Important Note: If your child wants to make an additional mug, the cost will be half of the original workshop price per extra piece, including all firings and painting.

 

Give your child the joy of creating their own special mug. Book your Kids’ Design Your Own Super Cool Mug Workshop today and let them craft a mug that’s sure to make every sip extra special!

location.address: Al Khayat Avenue, No 10, 19th street, Al Qouz 1, Dubai / UAE

title: Picasso Artists Kids Birthday Party
description:
Looking for a birthday party that’s as unique and creative as your child? At Picasso Artists Dubai, we turn birthdays into imaginative celebrations filled with art, laughter, and fun! Our studio is one of the top kids birthday party venues in Dubai, offering vibrant, safe, and fully equipped spaces where children aged 4 to 14 can explore their creativity. Our 2-hour Art Birthday Party Package engages kids in hands-on activities, interactive workshops, and themed projects, making every celebration both exciting and memorable.

From painting and sculpture to mixed-media crafts, our parties provide all materials, protective aprons, and guidance from our experienced team, ensuring a stress-free and fun experience for both children and parents. Optional add-ons like customized cakes, party favors, and themed decorations make the day even more special. We are among the best indoor birthday party places in Dubai, creating lasting memories and inspiring young imaginations so your child’s birthday becomes a colorful and joyful celebration that friends and family will remember for years to come.

Ongoing Events: Term Art Workshops and seasonal art camps with activities including Tie Dye, Tote Bag Designing, Drip Art, Fluid Art, Clay Art, and Ink Art.

Pricing: Pricing not stated online; booking and direct inquiry are required for current rates.

Age: Children of various ages can participate in these, and the activities are  tailored by age group.

location.address: Times Square Center - Ground Floor - Sheikh Zayed Rd - Dubai - United Arab Emirates

title: Petit Chefs FR JUNIOR CHEFS
description:
At Petits Chefs Dubai, we offer a unique FRENCH full immersion cooking course designed for kids, running for 11 weeks every Friday from 4-5:30pm. Our program not only teaches children the art of French cuisine but also emphasizes clean cooking and sustainability. Join us to inspire young chefs to embrace healthy culinary practices in a fun and engaging environment!

Ages: 4-10

Schedule:

Minis Chefs (Ages 4–6): Mondays, 4–5:30pm, 11-week term program.​

Junior Chefs (Ages 7–9): Saturdays, time varies, hands-on sessions with a mix of classic French recipes.​

Seasonal Camps: October Camp (Autumn/French cuisine theme), runs Monday to Friday, 9am–12pm, ages 4–10, each day with three recipes and pool party at week's end.​

Birthday Parties: Sundays (10am or 2pm slots), minimum six children, snack and activity included, AED 210 per child.

Pricing: Single class AED 165; 11-week term course AED 1679 (with gifts for early registration).

title: Eataly Dubai Mall Cooking classes
description:
One of the aspects that differentiates Eataly from other markets is the education we offer. At Eataly, you cannot only buy food, but you can also learn about food, its history, origin and the people behind it.

Open to all ages, La Scuola at Dubai Mall is a place that encourages people to play with ingredients and get to know our philosophy and approach to food and Italian food culture firsthand.

La Scuola di Eataly offers a unique culinary experience, collaborating chefs and local food & beverage experts that bring their expertise to increase the authenticity and the success of our educational program.

We also believe in unconventional education, bringing the school to the shop floor and into our laboratories, creating valuable interactions between us and our customers. For us, good eating is about engagement and education.

Events ongoing: Kids’ cooking classes run on weekends and during holiday periods, with two-hour sessions commonly held in the afternoons. Parents are encouraged to check Eataly’s social pages or contact the store to confirm the current schedule as sessions may vary.

Pricing: Standard session price is AED 85 per child, including all ingredients, refreshments, and tasting of their finished dish.

title: Courtyard Playhouse Mini Storytellers Winter Camp
description:
Mini Storytellers Winter Camp 2025 4-7 Years (Morning) W4

Let us take your child on a magical journey where they will creatively explore the wonderful and imaginative world of picture books by their favourite authors in our beautiful theatre!

Our unique Winter Camp will nurture and stimulate your child’s passion for storytelling, develop literacy skills and build confidence through drama games and movement.

Each day throughout the three weeks we will explore a new storybook forming the inspiration for theatre games, mime, role-play, as well as arts and crafts. Your child will develop their communication skills, learn to work as part of a team and think creatively, all whilst having fun under the guidance of instructors with a wealth of experience teaching children of all ages. At the end of each week the children will perform a mini showcase in our theatre for friends and family to enjoy.

Week 4 Books:Be Brave Even on the Coldest Days
How the Crayons Saved Christmas – Monica Sweeney
The Snow Thief – Alice Hemming
Lost and Found – Oliver Jeffers

location.address: The Courtyard Building Al Quoz 1, Dubai, UAE

title: Courtyard Playhouse Junior Actors Winter Camp
description:
Junior Actors Winter Camp 2025 8-11 Years (Afternoon) W4

Sign your child up for our Acting Winter Camp and let them explore their favourite books and characters through theatre! It will be a fun week filled with self-expression and spontaneity, where young performers develop valuable life skills that help build confidence and overcome anxieties.

Performing on stage can be one of the most exhilarating experiences of a child’s life. It’s not just about pretending to be someone else – it’s also about learning to be comfortable with who you are. The Courtyard Playhouse is a safe space where preteens meet likeminded individuals, feel accepted and free to be themselves.

Our Winter Camp caters for all levels and your child will be guided by talented instructors with a wealth of experience teaching children of all ages. Each week will see the participants deepening their love of books, developing their storytelling, stage presence, characterisation and teamwork skills and will conclude with a showcase for friends and family.

 

Book Focus of the Week:

The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe – C.S Lewis

location.address: The Courtyard Building Al Quoz 1, Dubai, UAE

title: Marionette Show Baden| Puppet Show | Children’s Puppet Entertainment
description:
This comic marionette performance entertains audiences with a delightful fusion of music, dances, and exquisitely crafted, evocative puppets as it takes them on an astonishing journey around the world!
Audiences are transported into a different world by the magnificent stage design and realistic puppets. A large number of marionettes, including Arabs, Flamenco dancers, Gypsies, Mexicans, and Indians, parade across the stage. Each puppet is played by an extraordinarily accomplished professional puppeteer. The act is totally adaptable and may be presented indoors or outdoors, despite its outstanding staging.
The play, which is intended to amuse both adults and children, has travelled the globe, participated in more than 80 international theatrical festivals, and performed as the main attraction on Star Cruises from 2012 to 2013, where it was well-received by the audience from across the world.
This marionette performance is a singular, never-before-seen production with exhilarating thrills, riveting drama, and side-splitting humour guaranteed.

location.address: Unit 3901, Dubai Marina Plaza Tower - Dubai Marina - Dubai - United Arab Emirates

title: Kutubna Cultural Center Storytime
description:
“A Place I Call home”: A Storytime with Ayesha Rahmaan

Date: Sunday, January 4, 2026 

Time: 11:00 am

Registration fee:  Free

Age group:  2 - 10 years 

Location: Kutubna Cultural Center, Madina Avenues, Nadd Al Hamar, Dubai

Moving to a new country is never easy, there's a new school, unfamiliar kids, and a new home to settle into. Hamza feels nervous about his family's decision to move, but he begins to realize that the things he left behind aren't so far away after all.
He discovers familiar sights, sounds, and traditions in his new country that help him adjust, making it feel a little more like home every day.
Ayesha Rahmaan is an American award-winning children’s author and educator with over fifteen years of experience inspiring young minds. As the owner of Alif2Yaa Publishing House, she creates educational toys, products and books that ignite curiosity and empower young learners.

location.address: Kutubna Cultural Center, Madina Avenues, Nadd Al Hamar, Dubai

title: TODA - Theatre of Digital Art | The Viennese Ball
description:
TODA cordially requests the pleasure of your company…

You are invited to an evening of elegance and celebration — a true Viennese Ball welcoming the New Year in timeless European style.

Step into the glittering world of imperial Vienna, where waltzes swirl beneath chandeliers and music sets the rhythm of the night. This one-hour New Year’s concert features the most beloved masterpieces of the Strauss dynasty, music that has defined joy, refinement, and festivity for generations.

From the overture of Die Fledermaus to iconic waltzes such as The Blue Danube, Emperor Waltz, and Voices of Spring, the program sparkles with instantly recognizable melodies.

Lively favorites like Tritsch-Tratsch Polka and Thunder and Lightning add brilliance, humor, and excitement.

To complete the atmosphere, authentically inspired masks from the era of grand Viennese balls will be displayed and worn, recalling the charm of traditional masquerade evenings.

Elegant attire is warmly encouraged, inviting guests to immerse themselves fully in the spirit of the occasion.

Performed by the UAE Philharmonic Orchestra, now back for a fresh season, this festive concert offers a joyful and unforgettable start to the New Year.

What's included

3 hours parking validation

Please note: Alcoholic beverages are not permitted inside the auditorium. Complimentary drinks (where included) and other alcoholic beverages may only be enjoyed in the foyer.

location.address: Souk Madinat Jumeirah Dubai Dubai, UAE AE 239774

title: TODA - Theatre of Digital Art | Dreams of Miyazaki
description:
An odyssey through Miyazaki wonderland at 360° brought by Gayane Aslanyan — an Armenian piano mastermind

Embark on a magical journey through the enchanting worlds of Hayao Miyazaki and Joe Hisaishi, where music and imagination come to life in a breathtaking 360° immersive experience.

Brought to you by Gayane Aslanyan, an Armenian piano virtuoso and winner of over 5 international piano competitions, this 60-minute performance transforms beloved soundtracks into a spellbinding musical adventure.

Enter Nausicaä’s valley, fly with Kiki on her broomstick, and soar above Laputa’s floating castle—all through the delicate, expressive power of the piano.

Let the melodies of My Neighbor Totoro, Princess Mononoke, Castle in the Sky, and more transport you to a realm where wonder knows no bounds.

Please note: The immersive visuals are inspired by Miyazaki’s films but do not feature the original animations.

What's included

  • 3 hours parking validation

location.address: Souk Madinat Jumeirah Dubai Dubai, UAE AE 239774

title: TODA - Theatre of Digital Art | The Jazz Night
description:
Sparkling theatrical Friday night of bold rhythms and glamorous flair!

Let the music seduce you, surprise you, and move you

Get ready for a Friday night like no other—bold, dazzling, and unapologetically fun. Step into a world of velvet vocals, sparkling brass, and rich grooves as The Jazz Night with Olesia Glants & Big Band lights up TODA with class, sass, and rhythm.

It’s not just jazz—it’s a full-sensory experience, with jazz standards and iconic pop hits reimagined into sultry, high-voltage showpieces.

Think New York, New York, Toxic, Shape of You, Mambo Italiano, Staying Alive, and more—familiar songs, but not how you’ve heard them before.

Olesia Glants, known for her powerhouse voice and magnetic stage presence, leads the night with a live big band that brings the room to life—bold brass, killer basslines, hypnotic swing, and all the sparkle of a golden-age jazz club.

This is your permission to tap your feet, sway in your seat, and let go. Because when jazz meets Friday night, the only rule is to feel everything.

What's included

3 hours parking validation

Please note: Alcoholic beverages are not permitted inside the auditorium. Complimentary drinks (where included) and other alcoholic beverages may only be enjoyed in the foyer.

location.address: Souk Madinat Jumeirah Dubai Dubai, UAE AE 239774
